narrative:
North Canton 1-B (precinct in Stark County) has 1,215 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points.
